example_sentence: TALPer is an AI learning companion.
example_translation: TALPer 是一個 AI 學習夥伴。
collocations: AI learning companion, generative-AI learning companion

example_sentence: The study is based on self-regulated learning theory.
example_translation: 本研究奠基於自我調節學習理論。
collocations: self-regulated learning theory, self-regulated learning framework

example_sentence: TALPer is embedded into an instructional framework.
example_translation: TALPer 被嵌入一個教學框架中。
collocations: structured instructional framework, 4L instructional framework

example_sentence: AI can become a scaffold for planning and reflection.
example_translation: AI 可以成為支持規劃與反思的鷹架。
collocations: digital scaffold, AI scaffold

example_sentence: The framework supports planning, monitoring, and reflection.
example_translation: 這個框架支持規劃、監控與反思。
collocations: monitoring understanding, planning and monitoring

example_sentence: The goal is to support conceptual understanding.
example_translation: 目標是支持概念理解。
collocations: support conceptual understanding, develop conceptual understanding

example_sentence: Without guidance, AI may produce passive dependence.
example_translation: 如果缺乏引導，AI 可能造成被動依賴。
collocations: produce passive dependence, avoid passive dependence

example_sentence: This study addresses the educational tension surrounding generative AI.
example_translation: 本研究處理生成式 AI 在教育中帶來的張力。
collocations: educational tension, tension surrounding GenAI

example_sentence: I will explain the theoretical framework of this study.
example_translation: 我會說明本研究的理論框架。
collocations: explain the theoretical framework, theoretical framework of the study

example_sentence: I will introduce TALPer and explain its functional design.
example_translation: 我會介紹 TALPer 並說明它的功能設計。
collocations: explain functional design, system functional design

example_sentence: The participants were fifth-grade students.
example_translation: 參與者是五年級學生。
collocations: research participants, study participants

example_sentence: I will describe our research design and analytical methods.
example_translation: 我會說明研究設計與分析方法。
collocations: statistical and analytical methods, describe analytical methods

example_sentence: I will present the major learning outcomes.
example_translation: 我會呈現主要學習成效。
collocations: major learning outcomes, aggregate learning outcomes

example_sentence: We analyzed ENA-based cognitive network structures.
example_translation: 我們分析基於 ENA 的認知網絡結構。
collocations: ENA-based cognitive network structures, compare cognitive network structures

example_sentence: Finally, I will discuss the implications of this study.
example_translation: 最後，我會討論本研究的啟示。
collocations: research implications, practical implications

example_sentence: I will discuss the limitations and future directions.
example_translation: 我會討論限制與未來方向。
collocations: limitations and future directions, suggest future directions

example_sentence: Earlier intelligent tutoring systems relied on adaptive mechanisms.
example_translation: 早期智慧型教學系統依賴適性機制。
collocations: earlier intelligent tutoring systems, AI tutoring systems

example_sentence: Adaptive mechanisms can support differentiated instruction.
example_translation: 適性機制可以支持差異化教學。
collocations: adaptive mechanisms for instruction, adaptive learning mechanisms

example_sentence: Generative AI can provide real-time feedback.
example_translation: 生成式 AI 可以提供即時回饋。
collocations: provide real-time feedback, AI real-time feedback

example_sentence: Passive use of AI may reduce learner agency.
example_translation: 被動使用 AI 可能削弱學習者主體性。
collocations: reduce learner agency, support learner agency

example_sentence: Students may move on without conceptual engagement.
example_translation: 學生可能在缺乏概念參與的情況下繼續前進。
collocations: without conceptual engagement, promote conceptual engagement

example_sentence: The theoretical foundation combines SRL and the 4L framework.
example_translation: 理論基礎結合 SRL 與四學框架。
collocations: theoretical foundation of this study, build a theoretical foundation

example_sentence: AI scaffolding must be paired with pedagogical scaffolding.
example_translation: AI 鷹架必須與教學鷹架相互配合。
collocations: paired with pedagogical scaffolding, AI and pedagogical scaffolding

example_sentence: The study is positioned at the intersection of AI and learning analytics.
example_translation: 本研究定位在 AI 與學習分析的交會處。
collocations: learning analytics, multimodal learning analytics
